stories.title: All-Star Starters Revealed — Dodgers Lead With 4, Freeman Earns 10th
stories.angle: The 2026 MLB All-Star starting lineups were revealed July 4 at 7:30 PM ET on FOX. The Dodgers lead all teams with four starters: Ohtani (NL DH), Freeman (NL 1B), Muncy (NL 3B), Pages (NL OF). Bobby Witt Jr. (AL SS) confirmed despite 72% Phase 2 lead. Freeman earns his 10th All-Star selection. 26 first-timers on the rosters. Ronald Acuña Jr. not selected. Full rosters announced July 6. Game July 14 at Citizens Bank Park.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 MLB All-Star starters are set.

Dodgers lead ALL teams with FOUR starters: Ohtani, Freeman, Muncy, and Pages.

The game is in Philadelphia. Phillies fans are going to have opinions about this.

#BallparkBanter #AllStarGame #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Freddie Freeman earns his 10th All-Star selection. 🧢

26 first-timers on the 2026 rosters.

Ronald Acuña Jr. was NOT selected — which tells you how deep this NL outfield field was.

Full rosters drop July 6. Game July 14 on FOX.

#BallparkBanter #AllStarGame #MLB

article.headline: 2026 All-Star Starters: Dodgers Place Four, Freeman Earns His 10th, 26 First-Timers

**NL Starters:**

- 26 first-time All-Stars on the rosters [HIGH]

stories.title: Yamamoto Strikes Out 10, Freeman Homers — Star-Spangled Sunday Highlights
stories.angle: Yoshinobu Yamamoto struck out 10 in 7 innings as the Dodgers shut out the Padres 3-0 in the Sunday Night Baseball finale of Star-Spangled Sunday. Freddie Freeman homered. All 15 MLB games aired on NBC/Peacock on July 5 — an MLB first. The Braves dominated the Mets 10-3 in the noon showcase game. The White Sox beat the Guardians 3-1, tightening the AL Central to one game.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Yoshinobu Yamamoto: 7 innings, 10 strikeouts, zero runs allowed.

Dodgers shut out the Padres 3-0. Freddie Freeman homered on All-Star announcement day.

The Dodgers are operating on a different level right now.

#BallparkBanter #Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Every single MLB game was on one company today — NBC/Peacock.

All 15. Every ballpark. One broadcaster. First time in history.

Braves 10, Mets 3. Dodgers 3, Padres 0. White Sox 3, Guardians 1.

The holiday weekend delivered. 🎆

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Baseball

article.headline: Yamamoto Strikes Out 10, Dodgers Win 3-0: A Star-Spangled Sunday to Remember

stories.title: Home Run Derby Update — Caminero In, Judge Out, Schwarber Conditional
stories.angle: Junior Caminero (Tampa Bay Rays, 28 HR, 7 HR in past week) is the first confirmed Derby entrant. Aaron Judge is out — confirmed with a rib stress fracture on his right side (IL since June 5). Kyle Schwarber (30 HR MLB leader, made the All-Star team) is conditionally in pending his back health. Derby is July 13 at Citizens Bank Park on Netflix — first time the event streams on a platform. New swing-based format (20 swings Round 1, 15 in Round 2 and Final).

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Home Run Derby update:

✅ Junior Caminero (Rays) — IN. 28 HR. 7 homers in a week.
❌ Aaron Judge (Yankees) — OUT. Rib stress fracture.
⚠️ Kyle Schwarber (Phillies) — conditional. Back health pending.

Netflix. July 13. Citizens Bank Park.

#BallparkBanter #HRDerby #AllStarGame

article.headline: Home Run Derby: Caminero Leads the Field, Judge Out With Rib Fracture

- Yordan Alvarez (Astros): confirmed NOT participating [HIGH]
- New Derby format: swing-based — 20 swings Round 1, 15 swings Round 2 and Final [HIGH]
- Broadcast team: Elle Duncan, Matt Vasgersian, Lauren Shehadi; analysts Barry Bonds, CC Sabathia, Hunter Pence, Anthony Rizzo [MEDIUM]

stories.title: Skubal Trade: Tigers Sweep Yankees But Detroit's Still Selling
stories.angle: The Tigers swept the Yankees this week — which raised questions about whether Detroit might hold Skubal. But the Tigers are 38-49, 8 games behind the White Sox in the AL Central. Clearly sellers. Braves remain frontrunner (Nightengale). Dodgers currently "not in." Yankees: "No chance. None." Brewers, Cubs, Phillies, Padres, Rays, Red Sox all named as interested. August 3 deadline: 29 days.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Tigers swept the Yankees in the Bronx.

But they're still 38-49. They're still sellers.

Braves remain the frontrunner per Nightengale. Yankees say "No chance. None." Brewers, Cubs, Phillies all in the mix.

August 3 deadline: 29 days.

#BallparkBanter #MLBTradeDeadline #MLB

article.headline: Tigers Swept the Yankees — and They're Still Trading Tarik Skubal

research.facts:
Skubal Trade
**Sources:** USA Today (Nightengale), Yahoo Sports, ESPN (Passan, Heyman), Bleacher Report
**Classification:** FOLLOW UP
**Verified facts:**
- Tarik Skubal: two-time defending AL Cy Young Award winner (Tigers) [HIGH]
- Tigers record: 38-49 as of early July; 8 games behind White Sox in AL Central [HIGH]
- Tigers swept the Yankees this week in the Bronx [HIGH]
- Trade deadline: August 3 at 6 PM ET (29 days away from July 5) [HIGH]
- Braves named frontrunner by Bob Nightengale (USA Today); rival executives view Braves as most likely [HIGH]
- Braves urgency: Spencer Strider still out due to injury [HIGH]
- Dodgers: "not in" at the moment per reports — but could change if Snell/Glasnow miss more time [HIGH]
- Yankees: a Yankees source said "No chance. None." [HIGH]
- Other teams named by Jon Heyman: Brewers, Cubs, Phillies, Padres, Rays, Red Sox [HIGH]
- ESPN published "nine Tarik Skubal blockbuster proposals" [MEDIUM]
- ESPN trade probability: 85% he gets traded [MEDIUM]
- Skubal 2026 stats: 2-2, 2.22 ERA, 23 K [MEDIUM]
- Skubal is a Scott Boras client and a free agent this fall [HIGH]

stories.title: AL Central Tightens to 1 Game — White Sox Win July 5, Chase Guardians
stories.angle: The Chicago White Sox beat the Cleveland Guardians 3-1 on July 5, trimming the AL Central deficit to 1 game. Guardians 47-43, White Sox 46-43. This two-team race has become the most compelling division story in baseball — especially with the White Sox's remarkable recovery from their 2024 record-setting 41-121 collapse. The trade deadline (August 3) looms as a key decision point for both clubs.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
White Sox just beat the Guardians 3-1.

AL Central standings:
Guardians: 47-43
White Sox: 46-43 — 1 game back.

Remember: the White Sox went 41-121 in 2024.

This is the best turnaround story in baseball. Period.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Baseball

article.headline: White Sox Win July 5, Sit One Game Back in AL Central: The Best Turnaround Story in Baseball

AL Central Standings

- White Sox beat Guardians 3-1 on July 5 at Progressive Field [HIGH]
- Guardians record: approximately 47-43 [MEDIUM — standings at time of research]
- White Sox record: approximately 46-43 — within 1 game of first place [MEDIUM]
- White Sox had 41-121 record in 2024 — one of the worst seasons in MLB history [HIGH]
- This two-team race for AL Central is the most dramatic standings turnaround context in baseball [HIGH]
- AL Central standings context: Twins (42-47, ~5 GB), Tigers (38-49/50, ~8-9 GB), Royals (35-53, ~11 GB) [MEDIUM]
- Trade deadline looms as decision point: Guardians buyers/sellers TBD; White Sox also in gray zone [MEDIUM]
